💻 About Me
- 🚀 Currently pursuing a Java Full Stack Development Internship at Destination Career,Bangalore.
- 🌱 I'm currently learning Spring Boot, React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Full Stack Development.;
- 💡 Interested in Java Development, Web Development, Data Structures & Algorithms, and Software Engineering.;
- 🎯 Continuously improving my coding, problem-solving, and software development skills.
- 📫 How to reach me: nikithabandla557@gmail.com
